text:
Once upon a time, in a small, cozy village nestled under a vast canopy of pines, there lived a peculiar little dragon named Dracos. Dracos was not your usual fiery reptile; in fact, he hardly ever lit up. Instead, he was fond of whispers and the sound of the night insects humming in the ancient woodlands.

During the long, snow-filled winters, Dracos would stretch out on his cozy moss mattress, dreaming of warmer places. There was a secret treasure he discovered in the farthest reaches of the forest that was as inviting as it was mysterious. It glowed softly in the moonlight, humming tunes that made his heart vibrate with excitement. But every time he approached, the treasure remained hidden, elusive.

One autumn evening, after a particularly dreary day, Dracos felt a peculiar tug at his tailfin. Following this odd sensation, he ventured further into the forest than ever before. His tiny wings fluttered against the chill winds as he
